name: Karakuri Ninja mdl 7749 "Nanashick"
name_jp: カラクリ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>七</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>七</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>四</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シッ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>九</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card must attack if able. When this face-up card is selected as an attack target, change its battle position. When this card is Normal Summoned, you can draw a number of cards equal to the number of face-up Defense Position "Karakuri" monsters you control.
